strengths: Strong Advanced Excel and Power BI skills
Proven process improvement with quantified impacts
weaknesses: Limited BI tool variety (Qlik not shown)
No direct ERP/data warehouse experience listed
Shorter tenure in relevant reconciliation roles
improvement_bullets: Optimized financial reconciliation processes by auditing large datasets to identify discrepancies, effectively resolving pricing disputes and chargeback claims to ensure revenue integrity.
Managed the end-to-end onboarding of new clients, coordinating with Sales and internal departments to integrate customer data into ERP and CRM systems for streamlined reporting.
Analyzed complex pricing claims using Advanced Excel and SQL, performing quality assurance audits to reconcile account balances and produce accurate monthly metrics for stakeholders.
Collaborated cross-functionally with Sales and Customer Care teams to translate business requirements into actionable data models, enhancing the efficiency of claims processing workflows.
Utilized data visualization tools to monitor reconciliation KPIs, proactively identifying trends in pricing variances and implementing process improvements to reduce future claim occurrences.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Reconciliation Analyst opportunity with Victaulic. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep commitment to data integrity and process optimization. What interests me about working for Victaulic is its industry-leading approach to dynamic pricing and its reputation for operational excellence; this approach inspires me because I thrive in high-volume environments where data precision directly impacts the bottom line. I believe my advanced proficiency in Excel and SQL, combined with my experience in cross-functional collaboration, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached complex data challenges with a focus on accuracy and efficiency. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a need for automated reporting and subsequently developed interactive dashboards that replaced manual data entry processes. By cleaning and standardizing datasets, I improved data processing efficiency by 40%, a result that mirrors the impact I aim to bring to the reconciliation and claims processing workflows at Victaulic. Ultimately, I know that the Reconciliation Analyst role at Victaulic would allow me to bring my analytical rigor to the auditing of pricing claims. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my stakeholder management skills. When onboarding new processes, I coordinated with multiple departments to ensure SOPs were clear and that data flows remained consistent. This initiative reduced new hire training time by 50% and ensured reliable reporting for executive leadership. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and SQL to assist in the research and resolution of chargeback claims at Victaulic. I know that my technical problem-solving and organizational skills align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
